title: Trump Is Urged to Move on Nuclear Site Thought to Be Beyond Reach of Bombs
summary_full: Little is known about Pickaxe Mountain, but some experts say it illustrates the impossibility of relying on force alone to prevent Iran from acquiring a nuclear bomb.
